message:
feat(demo): add Files page E2E tests (bd-1g80)

Add comprehensive E2E tests for the Files page file picker:
- e2e_files_navigate_and_preview: tests navigation with j/k keys,
  Enter to select/enter directories, Backspace to go back, and
  hidden files toggle with 'h' key
- e2e_files_fixture_mode: verifies fixture data mode works correctly

These tests validate the Files page integration and ensure the file
picker component functions correctly in the demo application.

Closes bd-1g80.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
